case_title: TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION VS. ROGER PEREZ et al

docket_entries.description: MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR DEC-15-2003 VACATED. CASE SETTLES AT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE.
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT PEREZ, ROGER ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS

NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT HEARING SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR DEC-10-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 218
MINI-MINUTES FOR DEC-10-2003 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 218

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ, ROGER DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO PLTF'S POSSESSION ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ, ROGER

ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT PEREZ, ROGER
MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON DEC-15-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PEREZ, ROGER THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 216 EDDY STREET #425 SAN FRANCISCO, CA., STAYED UNTIL FEB-10-2004, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. PER DIEM DAMAGES OF $1,100.00 WAIVED REPRESENTING PAST DUE RENT FROM 11/11/03 TO 1/5/04. SEE ADDITIONAL DETAILS IN STIPULATED JUDGMENT. IF DEFENDANT COMPLIES WITH ALL TERMS OF THE STIPULATED JUDGMENT, PLAINTIFF TO DISMISS THIS ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ, ROGER

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-10-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
MINI MINUTES:
Case assigned to Judge Pro Tem Arnold Evje, for settlement conference this date.
Clerk: Anna Redigonda.

Settlement conference held. Case settles. Parties stipulate to entry of Judgment, not on the record. Written stipulation submitted for Judge Hitchen's signature.
